mapper.sql: id, category_name, module_type, sort_order, status, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_category (category_name, module_type, sort_order, status, create_time) VALUES (#{categoryName}, #{moduleType}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_category SET category_name = #{categoryName}, module_type = #{moduleType}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, create_time = #{createTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_category WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY module_type ASC, sort_order DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM sys_category WHERE status = 1 AND module_type = #{moduleType} ORDER BY sort_order DESC, id DESC
